title: Address watch registry
description:
What: Implement AddressWatchRegistry — an in-memory, thread-safe map from diversified Sapling address (bech32 string) to payment session UUID.

Algorithm:
1. Define struct AddressWatchRegistry(DashMap<String, Uuid>) in cli/src/commands.rs or a new cli/src/watcher.rs.
2. Methods:
   - register(address: String, session_id: Uuid): insert into map.
   - deregister(address: &str): remove from map.
   - lookup(address: &str) -> Option<Uuid>: get.
3. Wrap in Arc<AddressWatchRegistry> for sharing between chat() main task and watcher task.
4. On startup: call register() for every Watching session loaded from DB (nie-fc4 does this).

Defensive programming:
- DashMap is Sync + Send; no additional locking needed.
- deregister on unknown address is a no-op (not an error).
- Do not store any key material in the registry — addresses only, session UUIDs only.

Tests:
- test_register_lookup_hit: register address A -> session X, lookup A, assert Some(X).
- test_lookup_miss: lookup unregistered address, assert None.
- test_deregister_removes: register then deregister, lookup returns None.
- test_concurrent_access: 2 threads register/lookup concurrently, no data race (run with --test-threads=N).

Acceptance: cargo test passes for registry unit tests; DashMap accessed without mutex; clippy clean.
close_reason: AddressWatchRegistry (DashMap wrapper) added with register/deregister/lookup; 6 unit tests pass; clippy clean
